Reduction in send volume to non-engaged people
Email revenue lift while sending 44% fewer emails*

body.intro: Most marketing teams run their email program off a campaign calendar in a spreadsheet, manual frequency-cap math, and CSV exports for reporting. Seventh Sense replaces all of that with a single AI layer that orchestrates, schedules, recycles, and surfaces insights automatically.

rows.ours: ✓ Full engagement history / all email types

rows.capability: Priority lanes - high-value sends bypass the cap

faq_items.answer: Yes - that's one of the biggest reasons operators choose us. Set your frequency caps, blackout windows, and priority lanes once. The AI orchestrates every send across every program automatically. No more spreadsheet juggling, no more "who's getting what this week" meetings.
faq_items.question: Can Seventh Sense replace my campaign scheduling calendar?

faq_items.answer: No - and that's by design. We've spent 12 years going deep on two platforms. If you're on Pardot, Klaviyo, or Eloqua, we'll tell you straight up that we're not the right fit.
faq_items.question: Will this work with my ESP if I'm not on HubSpot or Marketo?

faq_items.answer: HubSpot: about 5 minutes. Marketo: about 20 minutes. First insights and individualized profiles populate within 24 hours.
faq_items.question: How long does setup take?

faq_items.answer: No. We act as a scheduler, not a sender - your reporting in HubSpot or Marketo continues to work exactly as before. We add new dashboards on top.
faq_items.question: Will Seventh Sense affect my reporting?

faq_items.answer: In Marketo, we have dedicated API budget and self-throttle automatically. In HubSpot, we have dedicated API calls that don't compete with your other integrations.
faq_items.question: How does this affect API call usage?

faq_items.answer: Per-person engagement profiles surface inside the HubSpot CRM record and inside Marketo lead views - same place your marketing team is already working. No new tool to log in to.
faq_items.question: Where does the engagement data live?

faq_items.answer: Yes. Stair-step by contact volume, billed annually, no per-seat fees, no overage bills mid-term. Public on the pricing page above. Multi-year discounts available on request.
faq_items.question: Is your pricing really fixed?

faq_items.answer: SOC 2 Type II. GDPR & CCPA compliant. Trusted by global financial institutions and pharmaceutical companies. EU/regional data residency available H2 2026.
faq_items.question: What about security & compliance?

faq_items.answer: We don't, but onboarding, training, and continual optimization advice are included with every plan. We also have a vetted partner program of marketing agencies if you need more hands-on support.
faq_items.question: Do you offer professional services?

f1_checks.text: Answer the questions you've always wanted to ask - and the ones you didn't know to
Trends and anomalies your ESP buries - surfaced before they hurt

body.f1_p1: Most leadership teams still see email as a spam cannon - high volume, low value, a necessary evil disconnected from real revenue. That's because the metrics they get are surface-level (opens, clicks, sends), none of which prove influence.
body.f1_p2: Our AI surfaces the information that reframes the channel. Performance by inbox provider, sender & customer account, audience cohort trends, per-person engagement profiles, domain health - all in one place, all updated automatically.
body.f1_p3: The numbers that show email for what it actually is: an influence channel that drives pipeline, retention, and revenue.

f2_checks.text: Cross-campaign coordination across nurtures, batches, triggered flows
Blackout windows for launches, holidays, sensitive periods
Priority lanes - let high-value sends bypass the cap
Per-person daily & weekly frequency caps that actually hold
Spread sends evenly across the week - no more Monday blast

body.f2_heading: Retire your campaign calendar. Let the AI run the schedule.
body.f2_p1: Operators spend hours every week sequencing campaigns by hand - juggling launch dates, worrying about frequency caps, list wrangling to prevent email collisions, applying blackouts around product launches, deciding which campaign takes priority to prevent audience annoyance. Seventh Sense replaces all of that with a single rule layer the AI executes across every program.
body.f2_quote: "I want you to get three emails this week, but I don't know which lists you're in. You could be on all of them for all I know which means I don't know what emails you'll hit a cap on."

f3_checks.text: Protects deliverability without losing the person
Recovers revenue from people you'd otherwise ignore or remove
Works inside HubSpot workflows & Marketo programs natively

body.f3_heading: Stop annoying people who've tuned you out. Bring them back when they'll engage.
body.f3_p1: Re-engagement campaigns capture a sliver of dormant people and torch your domain reputation in the process. Recycling is the opposite - it works automatically, in the background, on every campaign.
body.f3_quote: "Our deliverability was absolutely awful. We obviously need tools that do this kind of thing for us, because finding people with this level of expertise is rare and expensive."

f4_checks.text: Per-person delivery times, always up to date
Probability of engaging in the next email - visible per person
Time-of-day & day-of-week peaks, learned from the entire history (not a limited timeframe) of a person's behavior
Habits drift - the model retrains daily, so sends stay timed to who they are now
12 years of send-time AI development behind every prediction

body.f4_heading: Every person has their own clock. Our AI learns it.
body.f4_p1: The send-time AI Seventh Sense built its name on. Every person has their own daily rhythm - peak hours, days they engage, devices they use. Our AI learns it from ALL of your historical engagement data and triggers each send at each individual's optimal time. Always up to date, in production, across every send.

f5_cards.body_html: Engagement dropped 18% in 30 days. Consider increasing your recycling threshold for this specific provider.
f5_cards.title: Office 365 audience needs attention

f5_cards.body_html: Deliver emails when each person is most likely to open them. Recommended optimization window: greater than 48 hours.
f5_cards.title: Enable Delivery-Time Optimization

f5_cards.body_html: Cycle people with the lowest predicted engagement in and out from campaigns. This helps improve overall engagement quality and program performance.
f5_cards.title: Enable Recycling or raise your threshold

f5_cards.body_html: Prevent emails from saturating customer inboxes and extend your optimization window. This reduces fatigue while improving overall engagement.
f5_cards.title: Configure Orchestration black-out periods

f5_checks.text: Recommendations specific to your program and audience
Strategic suggestions that go beyond Seventh Sense usage
Audience, cohort, and timing optimization opportunities
Continuously learning from billions of email events

body.f5_heading: Strategic recommendations from 12 years of email AI.
body.f5_p1: The AI advisor that mines a decade+ of cross-customer email program patterns - hundreds of billions of opens, clicks, and engagement signals - to tell you specifically how to make your email channel more profitable, more influential, and more successful. Not just better Seventh Sense usage. Better email marketing, period.
body.headline_html: The numbers your leadership actually wants to see.

The world's currency
isn't money - it's influence.
body.subhead: We're all drowning in email. We give you the AI to ensure your message is seen and provide the best opportunity for engagement.

body.headline_html: Pressing send is easy. Delivering real influence is hard.
body.lede: Every email list has two kinds of people: the ones engaging, and the ones being worn out. Seventh Sense's AI knows which is which - and what to do about it.

body.intro_text: We don't replace HubSpot or Marketo - we make them dramatically smarter. And when you want to see what's hiding under the hood at the inbox-provider level, person level, or program level, the Seventh Sense analytics system goes deeper than what HubSpot or Marketo ship natively — and tells you what to do about it.

body.slider_help: How many marketing contacts does your subscription include?
body.subhead: One annual subscription. Onboarding, training, support, and unlimited users included. Cancel any time before renewal.

body.body_para_1: "Delivered" only means the message didn't bounce. It tells you nothing about whether it actually made it to the inbox, spam or quarantine.
body.body_para_2: Adding to this, the inbox providers are never going to tell you either (nor will seed lists) because of malicious actors.
body.body_para_3: Inbox providers care about one thing: what percentage of their users engage with emails coming from you.
body.body_para_4: Keep sending to people who don't engage, and you train Google, Microsoft & Others to filter every email you send to the people who would. Our AI surfaces what's really happening - per inbox provider, per audience cohort, per email, per individual - and quietly fixes it before your next send.
body.eyebrow: The reality your ESP won't show you
body.headline_html: Your dashboard says 99.8% delivered. Your audience says "I never saw it."
body.quote_text: "Achieving this level of detail about our email channel has been a nightmare. There's no other tools I've been able to find that give you anything like this."

body.eyebrow: Free trial · No credit card required
body.fine_print: Connect read-only first. We never touch sends until you tell us to.
